reasoning: The Green Party of Canada currently holds 2 seats in the House of Commons and consistently polls in the mid-single digits (around 4-6%) nationally. To win the second most seats, they would need to surpass the Bloc Québécois (projected ~35+ seats), the NDP (projected ~20+ seats), and either the Conservative Party or the Liberal Party (both typically projected to win well over 50-100 seats). There are absolutely no current polling trends or political realignments that suggest the Green Party could increase its seat count fifty-fold in the upcoming 2025 election.
